title: sarcobataceae
intro: The rank Sarcobataceae refers to a small family of succulent plants. Sarcobataceae is a monotypic family, consisting of a single genus, Sarcobatus. This family is primarily found in the southwestern United States and Mexico, and is characterized by its small, shrubby plants with thick, fleshy leaves. Sarcobataceae plants are adapted to arid environments and are often found growing in dry, sandy areas.
